entry.title: Re: What’s New in SAP Build – Q4 2024 Edition
entry.content:
Hello @JesseSukhbayar 

Thank you for sharing the updates.

But looks SAP Help Documentation is not yet updated with RFC/BAPIs under Action Projects (Live APIs).

Please let me know if there is any other way to read the Documentation for Actions using RFC/BAPIs.

Thank you,

Venkat Vyza

entry.title: Re: 高级公司间销售和高级公司间库存转储 2208版本常见问题集锦
entry.content:
Dear expert,

上文提及高级公司间销售不支持MTO的业务场景， 这里是指对客户的销售订单也不支持按单的模式？

实际测试中对客户的销售订单是按照MTO, 但中转工厂的物料凭证无法产生，VCM提示需要维护E库存。请问在高级公司间销售流程中，是否支持对客户的订单是按照MTO的模式发货过账，而公司间的按照MTS的模式过账。

entry.title: Re: SAP_BASIS_CONFIG_OSS_COMM [New OSS: Create HTTPS Conn...
entry.content:
Dear Customer, 

Error "NIECONN_REFUSED" is a pure network error that indicating the connection error from the configured system to SAP links. The router string should be wrongly used. Please verify with XX-SER-NET team for the correct router string for the system. After getting the correct router string, please create a new tasklist to see the result. 

Best regards,
Vera Jiang

entry.title: 2502 C4C Release Discussion
entry.content:
Hi SAP,

When will this be published?

Cheers,

Marc

entry.title: Jira Integration With SAP Cloud ALM
entry.content:
Hello Team,

How to Integrate SAP Cloud ALM with JIRA?

Best regards,


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Jira Integration With SAP Cloud ALM
entry.content:
Dear Customer,

Please follow the steps outlined in the SAP Community blog Integrate SAP Cloud ALM with JIRA.

Best regards，
Ellie

entry.title: What is the planned replacement for Configuration Validation in Cloud ALM?
entry.content:
What is the planned replacement for Solution Manager Configuration Validation, Dashboard Builder and the Security Optimization Service once Solution Manager is out of service.     
Will there be equivalent functionality offered in ALM once Solution Manager is out of service?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: What is the planned replacement for Configuration Val...
entry.content:
Dear Customer,

In Cloud ALM, we have CSA(Configuration and Security Analysis) function instead of Configuration Validation in Solution Manager system.
"Transition to Configuration and Security Analysis in SAP Cloud ALM provides analysis and validation of configuration items like technical parameters, software versions and patch levels."
For more details, please refer to the information below. You can find more information about transition to SAP Cloud ALM as well.

https://support.sap.com/en/alm/sap-cloud-alm/transition-to-sap-cloud-alm.html
 

Best regards,

Haterm

SAP Support

entry.title: Re: Crystal Report help!
entry.content: try one thing at a time, you still have to test for the other conditions...

entry.title: Re: How to expose on-premise SAP B1 service layer with si...
entry.content: you can configure and use any ports for the external urls. in my example in the slide I used the port 443 for the Web client service and 8443 for the rest of the services. refer to the page 38 and 39 in the slide.

entry.title: Re: How to Install SSL Certificate for SAP B1 Web Browser...
entry.content:
Hello @hlak 

The ssl certificate cannot be installed to the IP address. 

Would you first go through my blog and session recordings to cover your topic?

https://community.sap.com/t5/enterprise-resource-planning-blogs-by-sap/best-practices-for-technical-...

For the step-by-step guide on how to implement this configuration, access the e-learning course on the SAP PartnerEdge portal (S-user required) :

  • Presentation
  • Step-by-step video


Regards
Eunseok

entry.title: Re: Physical Inventory with respect to WM
entry.content:
Hi frenz,

How to create system inventory record for 200 bin in one time.. If I use t-code LI01N I need to copy paste  the bin from excel more times until 200...

Got any mass t-code for print count sheet..?!

entry.title: Set column width in CAP value help popup
entry.content:
I have a field in a CAP application which has a value help popup. I'm able to change certain things which appear in the value help popup using annotations, such as which fields are displayed, like this:

annotate service.CurrencyConversion with {
    fromCurrency
    @Common.ValueList: {
        Label : 'From Currency',
        CollectionPath : 'Currencies',
        Parameters : [
            {
                $Type : 'Common.ValueListParameterInOut',
                LocalDataProperty : 'fromCurrency_code',
                ValueListProperty : 'code',
            },
            {
                $Type : 'Common.ValueListParameterDisplayOnly',
                ValueListProperty : 'descr'
            }
        ],
    }
};

However, I have not been able to change the widths of the displayed columns. I would like to make them wider so that the column labels can be seen. 

A similar example can be seen in this learning Journey (Enriching Value Help with Dependent Filtering). My own example is similar to the screenshot below, where the first column is too narrow to see the entire column label. However, I have not found a way to increase the width of the column. Is anyone familiar with how to do this?

Through some searching I have found potential options, like using the annotation ![@HTML5.CssDefaults] : {width : '10rem'} (Setting the Default Column Width | SAP Help Portal), however this does not appear to work with value help tables. I also looked into setting the width in the manifest (Setting the Default Column Width - Documentation - Demo Kit - SAPUI5 SDK), however this also does not appear to be relevant for value help popup tables. Any help would be appreciated.

entry.title: Upgrade from BI 4.2 to BI 4.3 - Which Service Pack and patch should be used?
entry.content:
Hello Experts, 

Currently on BI4.2 SP09 and want to upgrade to BI4.3. Not sure which Service Pack and patch we should upgrade to? We want to upgrade to Service pack which is stable and supports components like Webi, UDT, IDT and Crystal reports. Objective is to upgrade and have exiting components work as is. We don't plan to use new features. Upgrade is more to move to supported version. Any help on this would be much appreciated. 

Thanks

entry.title: Re: TRM payment reference in Transaction Manager
entry.content: Informed expert.

entry.title: what's the difference between edit_mask and convexit in alv Field Catalog?
entry.content:
Hi,

I'm a new abap developer, I use alv to develop reports.

There are two ways to use the Conversion Exit:

1. Use edit_mask

 

edit_mask = '==ALPHA'

 

2. Use convexit

 

convexit = 'ALPHA'

 

What is the difference between the two?

If edit_mask can achieve the function, then isn't convexit redundant?

entry.title: Re: Fingerprints for SFTP Destinations in SAP BusinessObjects BI Platform 4.1
entry.content:
@ted_ueda 

Do you know if this process works for Azure SFTP?  I am tring o deliver to an SFTP desination with BOBJ 4.3 and teh descriptions fingerprints look nothing like the "20 pair + colon" style.

Any help appreciated.

entry.title: Re: FY variant under DRC (bi-monthly reporting)
entry.content:
Hi MIlos,

For bi-monthly reporting period, you can use the fiscal year variant "BM". And as the reporting date should be 2 months after the reporting period, you can specify the offset as 2 months.

Hope this answers your query.

Thanks & Best Regards
Abhishek

entry.title: Print Slip Goods Receipt
entry.content:
Hello Everyone,

Is there any possibility to make tick automatically for print GR slip in SAP S4HANA Cloud Public Edition?

 Thank you!!!

#SAPS4HanaCLoudPublicEdition

#Procurement

entry.title: Open Brazil Localization Tax Settings J1BTAX for direct update Without Transport Requests
entry.content:
In standard SAP, Brazil's localization tax customization is handled through transaction code J1BTAX. This transaction provides a cluster of tables that manage data for various taxes such as IPI, ICMS, PIS, COFINS, ISS, and more. While these tables are transportable, they must be manually maintained in each SAP landscape due to differences in master data and condition table numbering settings. As a result, the SAP system should have the ability to allow tax changes specific to each environment without requiring transport requests.

To achieve this, follow the steps outlined below:

Step 1: Navigate to transaction code SE54 and enter the relevant table/view name.

Select ‘Generated Objects’ and then click ‘Create/Change’.

 

Step 2: Verify the selected radio button in the ‘Record Routine’ field.

If ‘Standard Recording Routine’ is selected, change it to ‘No, or User-Defined Record Routine’.

 

Now the table is open for direct modification.

Step 3: Repeat the steps 1 and 2 for all J1BTAX tables listed below:

Table

Description

J_1BTXDEF

Default Tax Rate Values

J_1BTXIP1

IPI Values

J_1BTXIP2

IPI Material-Dependent Exceptions

J_1BTXIP3

IPI Dynamic Exceptions

J_1BTXIC1

ICMS Values

J_1BTXIC2

ICMS Material-Dependent Ex

J_1BTXIC3

ICMS Dynamic Exceptions

J_1BTXCI1

ICMS-Complement Exceptions

J_1BTXST2

Sub Trib Values

J_1BTXST1

Sub Trib Material-Dependent Exceptions

J_1BTXST3

Sub Trib Dynamic Exceptions

J_1BTXISS

ISS Values

J_1BTXPIS

PIS Values

J_1BTXCOF

COFINS Values

J_1BTXWITH

Withholding Tax Rates and Assign Official Collection

J_1BATL1

Tax Law ICMS

J_1BATL2

Tax Law IPI

J_1BATL4

Tax Law COFINS

J_1BATL5

Tax Law PIS

Step 4: Add transaction code J1BTAX and all above relevant tables with Activity Key 02 (Change) to a separate business role. Assign this role only to specific user(s) who are authorized to make updates in the system.

Step 5: Test the change by accessing transaction code J1BTAX in the non-development system before transporting it to the target system.

 

 

********************************************End*********************************************

entry.title: Re: Updating J1BTAX in production
entry.content:
Dear All, 

I have posted a blog on SAP Community for the solution to this problem. Please check the link below: 

https://community.sap.com/t5/financial-management-q-a/open-brazil-localization-tax-settings-j1btax-for-direct-update-without/qaq-p/13991416

Thanks

Avnish

entry.title: Re: Error when creating Production Order
entry.content:
Hi,

Check if the Warehouse Code displayed in the application (B1 client) for the Item Code and on the backend (using MSSQL Studio or HANA Studio) are same or not. This looks to be some case (uppercase/lower case issue).

Also, have a look at the SAP Note 1410811. If unable to open the SAP Note, contact your partner. He would be able to using the Partner S-User ID and Password.

Kr,

Jitin

entry.title: Re: How to use GOS attachment URL in CDS view
entry.content:
I wanna use URL itself in Datasphere.

Datasphere makes report including URL, therefore CDS View must include URLs as text.

(Create external document(PDF))

entry.title: Class and Characteristics in Material
entry.content:
Dear Expert,

I would like to utilize the Classification in Product Master. Are there any documents that detail the complete process for setting up Material Class and Characteristics?

Additionally, Can the product master file search be filtered based on the entered characteristics? Is there a report available for Material Characteristics? For example, I would like to compare the sales revenue across different Characteristics or view a product list for each characteristic, and so on.

Thank you for your assistance!

entry.content: Table V_T549Z has been configured. Cumulation year has been changed based on suggestion but this still does not solved the issue.

entry.title: I am trying to create a virtual element for the CDS view and need to get the output as string or tex

entry.title: SAP ABAP Uploading a package
entry.content:
Hey,
I wanted to ask you that is it possible to upload a package into a sap system. It like I created a package in one of the client system and in that package are all my programs, DDIC elements such as tables, structure, table type, Function Module etc. Now for another client I needed to create all the same things but with minor changes. So, I was hoping is there a way that I can download the package created in previous client and upload it new client, so I don't have to create all the objects again.  #SAP ABAP # ABAP

entry.title: Re: MaxDB restore failing
entry.content: restore failed -> disk_not_accessible, data file empty, backup file gone. => all this looks like there is file system issue, or do you have some anti-virus software, which may touch OS file? Maxdb software itself, won't delete file or make data file empty.

entry.title: Re: SAP GUI problem create abap project
entry.content:
Hi 

Check this SAP Note 2498490

BR

SS

entry.title: Re: Anyone who have encountered the configuration of CRT...
entry.content: After V_T549Z changes been saved in a transport, has Time Evaluation and Payroll Calculation been executed in DEV ? I'll look at my notes tomorrow, but I'm running our of ideas (would have to look at your config).

entry.title: Re: SAC | Creating dynamic thresholds for the sac tables.
entry.content:
@himanshu_ts_sharma 

May be you should try defining thresholds not based on static numbers but rather another measure. This measure values can be tweaked by end user.

 

Nikhil

entry.title: Issues when re-opening calibration session: Form not route to Calibration Step
entry.content:
Our performance period have a big problem when we reopen calibration session. More details:

- We set up a route map following step: Manager 1st Review Mid Year > Manager 1st Review Year End > Manager 2nd Review > Calibration > Dicussion > Employee Sign > Manager 1st Sign > Manager 2nd Sign

- We create a session include ~100 subject include, change rating and finalise it

- Next, some form was processed to Dicussuion, some is Employee Sign,..

- Next, we re-open session in Home > Calibration, we click to Re-open icon and message appear: ... and will route form to Calibration Step

The big issue is some of form after re-open session do not route to Calibration step(some form is move to step previous Calibration, some hold in current step)

I check some SAP knowledge, KBA are alose no limitation from here. So, Do you meet a same case in your company or your customer ?

entry.title: Re: Prorate based on Months not days
entry.content:
Hi Carsten,
what if I use duration calculation to calculate months and then apply price accordingly.
for example : from duration calculation I get the active duration of subscription, then I divide it by 12 (use case is of yearly billing cycle), then multiple the output by price.
this way I am applying price(prorate) based on months.
thanks,
Ankit

entry.title: Re: What you need to get and stay certified
entry.content: @Margit_Wagner, your first post was helpful because not many people would know to click the globe icon on the right to get started. My wife and I went in circles trying to find where to purchase one attempt for the exam (is that posted somewhere on the SAP website?). Thank you!

entry.title: Re: SAC | Creating dynamic thresholds for the sac tables.
entry.content: Thanks nikhil, can you please suggest how to achieve the same. Also, will it work for the live data models.

entry.title: Query Regarding Row Count of ECC Tables via DVM in SAP Solution Manager

------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: RAP Business Events with Advanced Event Mesh [2]: Creating custom business events
entry.content:
Hi @TimoMaier 

I have created a custom event that needs to be triggered for sales order create. We need the custom event as we there are some Z fields that we need included in the payload. The event binding is done, and the topic is subscribed in the channel, but I do not see the event triggered. 

Below are some screenshots.

Is there any other config that needs to be done? The vent is not even triggered now.

Regards,

Smohan

entry.title: Re: SAC - Updata data loaded from local file
entry.content:
If you don't want to redo the mapping and wrangling, you can simply use 'Replace data source' option of import job in data management( of new model). 

Or you may also consider to use the new file upload widget to load data from local file in story directly. For more details, please refer to this blog: https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-sap/new-end-user-file-upload-in-sap-analytics-cloud-qrc3-2024/ba-p/13780915

entry.title: Re: AZT_TM_adhoc Report deprecation date confirmation
entry.content: What do you mean by 'deprecation of Ad Hoc Report'? Would you please provide more details?

entry.title: Re: How to show a custom message in story while the table values load from live connection?
entry.content: Not so sure what is really need here. If it's live connection, tables and charts are always showing the latest data from source. All the visible data should be up to date.

entry.title: Re: Error when creating Production Order
entry.content: This error is also generating while doing the Goods Receipt Account

entry.title: While deleting the PO line item, Output status is in "to be output"
entry.content:
Here the issue they are facing is, while creating a PO and during saving the PO the output (BRF+) is getting completed. Then while making any changes (for eg: quantity change), the output is getting completed while saving. But when they try to delete the PO line item and save it, the output is in the "To be output" status.

Please find the attachments for output screen. Please help me analyze the issue.

entry.title: Re: Issue calling remote odata service (via approuter) from trial version of abap environment on SCP
entry.content: Hi, What was the issue here? Were you able to resolve this?

entry.title: Re: Intent-based Navigation - semanticObjectAction annotation
entry.content: Can you maybe pass the xml annotation sample that shows how this Identification annotation is linked to the "QuickViewFacets" annotation? Thx!

entry.title: Re: Universal Allocation on the basis of revenue
entry.content:
Regarding the 'No receiver found' error when running allocation cycle, it's always suggested you to check whether there are postings exist for the combination of receiver.

For example, in your scenario, if you are using margin analysis type allocation, you can check whether there are posting data exist via 'Market Segments - Actuals'. And also take a look at the posting period, sometimes, there are no posting data for allocation cycle run period and cause the error.

entry.title: GRC Tuesdays: What Risks to Look Out for in 2025
entry.content:
As it is now customary, I wanted to open the year with a first blog on the risk landscape and what experts, analysts, journalists, and business leaders raised as being top concerns for the year to come.

Since there have been quite a few changes in the ranking, I have also provided below a comparison against the last 2 years. You will also find the previous posts online:

  • GRC Tuesdays: What Risks to Look Out for in 2024
  • GRC Tuesdays: What Risks to Look Out for in 2023

Reminder of the state of Top Risk Categories from prior years:

 

2023

2024

 

If 2024 was a year of “risk consolidation” so to say, with a lot less fragmented and scattered responses and a clear consensus on Economic Conditions being the major concern for the year, things have shifted again and Information Technology is now the most often cited risk amongst all reports reviewed. It was already in the top 3 last year though, so this is not a great surprise. But there are a few explanations as to why this risk has risen, once again.

 

Top 5 risk categories in 2025

 

Consolidated top risk categories from 25+ recent publications

A few words about the methodology applied. As for previous years, I went over various risk reports (25+ and you will be able to find the details at the bottom of this post) and extracted the most often cited categories. These reports cover a range of industries and geographies, and the results are of course somewhat subjective as they rely on people’s opinions.

 

Information Technology

 

Information Technology rose from 3rd place last year to the 1st area of concern for 2025. Many reports cite recent major disruptions such as the CrowdStrike downtime to alert on what could be early warning indicators of a wider IT threat. As per the experts, this is mostly due to a concentration of services and technology among a few major providers posing the risk of a systemic failure. Kind of takes us back to the systemic risk that was on everyone’s mind during the great financial crisis of 2007... Thankfully, intervention and legislation prevented the full collapse of the system back then. Maybe as a parallel, some policy makers advocate for stronger regulation in this area as well. But the remedy here can’t be capital requirements as it was for the banking industry so they will need to find an adequate solution.

And of course, within this risk category is Artificial Intelligence. AI is reshaping all aspects of our lives and has been compared to a new industrial revolution – even wider in its reach. It could solve many issues... or create new ones. Once again, there are calls for more governance around AI to make sure that the genie is contained in the bottle or computer.

 

Supply Chain

 

If Supply Chain was of great concern during the Covid pandemic and, as a matter of fact, is systematically in the top 10 of all reports, it has reached 2nd position for 2025. The unknowns about potential trade policy restrictions from large economic powers (potential new tariffs from US towards Canada, China and Mexico, EU-Mercosur Trade Agreement reservations, etc.) account for a large part, but so does the increased sanction packages – especially from Switzerland, the European Union, the United Kingdom, Canada, Australia and of course the United States that “imposes three times as many sanctions as any other country or international body, targeting a third of all nations with some kind of financial penalty on people, properties or organizations” as per The Washington Post.

In addition to trade restrictions, the logistics aspect is another main driver of the risk level for this category. The fact that many hot spots for logistics – including for transport of goods, are located in disputed areas clearly introduces uncertainties. Some routes might have to be diverted if water levels in Panama Canal continue to decrease, if attacks on ships in the Red Sea persists... and trade routes in the Black Sea have already been affected with the ongoing conflict in the region.

Finally, a new aspect is also being flagged more frequently which is a direct result of above: a trend of retreating from globalization. This is leading to a strategic realignment with reshoring and even “friendshoring”. But I’ll get to that point in the very next category.

 

Geopolitics

 

Geopolitics is in the top 5 list, which is not a surprise since 2025 will once again be a year of political confrontation with key elections in major countries across all continents (Argentina, Australia, Cameroon, Canada, Chile, Czech Republic, Ecuador, Egypt, Iraq, Ireland, Niger, Norway, Philippines, Poland, Russia, Singapore, and Venezuela just to name a few) and also within major international organizations such as the UN Security Council for instance.

These elections could change the political landscape and even create new partnerships and alliances. Which brings me back to the “friendshoring” trend highlighted in supply chain. Here, instead of deciding to manufacture or source from most economically beneficial locations, the decision is instead to do so from countries that are geopolitical allies – hence pre-empting the return of trade wars or protectionism measures. Whereas multipolarism has been a source of stability for some time, these elections could also weaken political and economic unions. European fragmentation is always a key concern but so is the breakup of the G7 or G20 clubs. Especially if there were to be major political instability in one or more member countries.

 

Economic Conditions

 

With the rising cost of living, delayed interest rate lowering or even continued risk interest rates, and wage stagnation, consumer spending slowdown – particularly among younger generations, impacts Economic Conditions. As a matter of fact, economic forecast is not great for many established economies. Even if some countries such as the United States have shown a level of resiliency already. Global recession is a possibility and would lead to further liquidity and insolvency issues. Many of the factors presented above, especially the Geopolitical risks and the impact on manufacturing, will of course add further pressure here creating resource scarcity, cascading into increased prices for goods but also for materials and even energy. Return of inflation is therefore still high on Central Bank’s risk radar.

 

 

Cybersecurity

 

If Cybersecurity is in 5th position this year, just slightly below its previous rankings, it’s not because it’s going away. Simply that other risks are more top of mind in the various surveys.

In addition to operational disruptions and advanced frauds and attacks – especially AI-powered hacks, cybersecurity is also cited as a source of global distrust. One key concern raised by experts is the spread of disinformation that creates a lack of trust in public institutions. If this is true for local politics, it also impacts international organizations – weakening the likes of the World Trade Organization or the United Nations. Hence automatically increasing the likelihood of Geopolitical risks manifesting. It’s all connected really.

 

Positive Outlook

 

But it’s not all doom and gloom. Far from it.

The theme of the 2025 World Economic Forum is “Collaboration for the Intelligent Age”, so there is some hope that some of the above, including the trust factor amongst major stakeholders might be restored.

Closer to us, there is also the expectation that AI will revolutionize healthcare and enable early diagnosis of diseases for more timely treatment.

And, despite the underwhelming outcomes of the COP29, the Energy Revolution is in progress and the focus on climate change, biodiversity, and environmental sustainability is not just vain words. It’s an ethical, financial and regulatory reality for most companies. So there is great hope for 2025!

What about you, what risks do you and your organization have on the radar for the year to come? I look forward to reading your thoughts and comments either on this blog or on Twitter @TFrenehard

 

Sources

 

If you’d like to drill-down further, I have shared below the sources that I used to put together the summary graph.

Of course, if there are other reports that you use and would recommend, I’d love to hear about them so don’t hesitate to add them in the comments section!

 

  • American Society for Public Administration (ASPA) – Top Risks on the Horizon for 2025
  • Aon – Global Risk Management Survey
  • BlackRock – Geopolitical Risk Dashboard
  • Capital Economics – Towards 2025: Risks to the global economic and market outlook
  • Control Risks – RiskMap 2025
  • Control Risks – Top risks for businesses in 2025
  • European Confederation of Institutes of Internal Auditors (ECIIA) – Risk in Focus 2025: Hot topics for internal auditors
  • Fitch – World of Worries: Political Risks in 2025
  • Forrester – Predictions 2025
  • Gartner – 2025 Risk–Based Audit Plan Hot Spots and Key Actions
  • Gartner – Top Emerging Risk Trends
  • Global Guardian – 2025 Global Risk Map Executive Summary and Key Takeaways
  • Grant Thornton – Banking 2025
  • Institute of Internal Auditors (IIA) – Risk in Focus 2025
  • Institute of Risk Management (IRM) – Risk Agenda 2025
  • International SOS – Risk Outlook 2025
  • Intuition – Top 5 operational risks for banks in 2025
  • KPMG – Top risks forecast
  • KPMG – Top Risks to Australian Business 2024–25
  • Maplecroft – The political risk ‘signals’ to watch in 2025
  • PKF Littlejohn – Insurance sector risks and priorities for 2025
  • PWC – Risk Management 2025 and Beyond
  • ResearchAndMarkets – Global Risk Heatmap Report 2024–2025
  • Supply Chain 24/7 – The top 3 risk trends for 2025
  • World Economic Forum – Three risks we aren't talking enough about

entry.title: How to create user in a newly installed SAP CAL Appliance (S4HANA 2023)
entry.content:
Hi,

I'm experiencing an issue with my SAP CAL account. I am unable to:

  1. Create new users: The user creation request form is not visible.
  2. Access the installed SAP appliance: My admin credentials are not allowing me to log in the installed S4HANA system.

Could you please assist me in resolving it?

Thank you for your time and assistance.

entry.title: Re: What is an app for budget and commitment carry forwar...
entry.content: Kindly have a look at KBA ##2916914 - How to make availability control on budget for year carry forward. Availability control for projects can't carry forward the budget to the next fiscal year. However, you can consider to choose "Overall Budget" for budget availability control profile setting. In SSCUI Maintain Budget Availability Control Profile for Projects (102413), you can see there is column "Time Range" for the profile setting. Annual Budget - there is no budget carry forward. Overall Budget - budget is valid all over the project life span. Choose the proper profile according to your requirement. And for cost center budget, the only option is 'Annual Budget'.

entry.title: Re: How do I edit the timestamp of the SFTP Adapter in SA...
entry.content:
Hi Miguel,

In this case I am assuming you are using SFTP sender adapter. On advanced tab you can set the ASMA filename property on. Then in message mapping/java mapping/adapter module(receiver adapter) you need to access the file name using default Namepace ""http://sap.com/xi/XI/System/File" as shown in this sample code.

Change the filename in the UDF/java mapping/adapter module from out-kostenstelle-YYYYMMTT-HHmmss.xml => kostenstelle-YYYYMMTT.xml using simple substring function of java. 

Use ASMA in target side adapter also. 

 

Regards

Anupam

entry.title: Re: API to read data from Manage Workforce app
entry.content:
Hello KhaingZinTun,

Some additional information on reading data from system.

We have many CDS views to read the Worker data which are C1 released. You may also use those CDS views to create custom API for reading worker data.

Please find below documentation regarding the same:

CDS Views for Human Resources | SAP Help Portal

Exposing a Custom CDS View as External API | SAP Help Portal

Best regards,

Irene

entry.title: Re: How to Install SSL Certificate for SAP B1 Web Browser...
entry.content:
Hi hlak

Please follow SAP NOTE 3381751 to update the certificate again, or alternatively, perform a SAP Business One Browser Access reinstallation and select the new certificate file during this process.

Kind Regards
Nidhi Singh

entry.title: Re: Error when creating Production Order
entry.content:
Hi Underdog 

Please check SAP Note 2254409 for the issue faced.

To overcome the error on the current version, you need to change the system language to English and disable the bin locations for the selected warehouse.

Kind Regards
Nidhi

entry.title: Re: MDG Cloud Ready Mode: Custom Workflow template in SAP build process automation with S/4HANA
entry.content:
Hi Frederik,

My inbox application is local to every application which has a workflow management kind of feature. For build process automation we use inbox which is part of SAP build workzone. For cloud ready mode since build process automation is the workflow tool, my inbox in work zone is used in Tandem. Even for other standalone applications where core logic runs on S/4 HANA, workflow in build process automation, it can be designed to consume My inbox app in build work zone.

Hope this is helpful, feel free to comment your views as well.

Regards

Anirban

entry.title: Re: Failed to get access token, contact your administrator
entry.content:
Hi TSAI0528 

As issue is only on local machine, please try below steps:

Can you please check if the following SLD address are same:

"SLDAddress" in below file on Client machine:

C:\Program Files\SAP\SAP Business One\Conf\b1-local-machine.xml

and 

SLD address under SLD Control Center - Security tab

If they are different, please update "SLDAddress" in b1-local-machine.xml with the same address under SLD Security tab. Then test if the issue still exists when logon Client.

And we don't suggest installing 2 clients (32bit and 64bit) on the same machine. If the above solution doesn't work, can you uninstall all the clients and only install 64bit Client to see if the issue can be resolved?

Kind Regards
Nidhi

entry.title: list of items field is not displaying (SAP b1)
entry.content:
Hello experts,

 

May I ask why ITEM COST field is not seeing in list of items report. while in form setting the field is yet available and visible either.

 

List of items

Form settings

 

 

TYIA

entry.title: Re: SAP ABAP Proxy to PO - large data error
entry.content:
Hi Jakob,

               Underlying hardware such as RAM size plays a vital role of holding data being sent over connection. Hence changing the parameter values may not help solve the issue.  In this case ABAP proxy must split message to smaller size before sending to PI. PROXY is not suitable for large volume of data for simple reason as this data is held by main memory of server. In this case large volume of data must be split before sending to PI using proxy or use file-based communication instead of proxy. 

 

Regards

Anupam

entry.title: Re: work field in operation tab pages of maintenance order.
entry.content: this above note is currently not available , kindly provide solution

entry.title: Re: Goods Issue Reversal, Cancel Picking and Outbound Delivery Zero Out Quantity
entry.content: Nice Blog.. Thank you for sharing

entry.title: Implementation of Restrictions for Tyre and Battery Installation in SAP Equipment Master
entry.content:
Hie Experts,

We need to implement restrictions in SAP to ensure that only a limited number of tyres and batteries can be installed on equipment. If someone tyres to install an additional tyre or battery beyond the allowed limit, the system should prevent the installation.

For example, if one piece of equipment is allowed to have only 10 tyres, and an attempt is made to install an extra tyre, the system should block this action.

entry.title: How to migrate data from SAP BW to SAP Datasphere BW bridge or SAP BW/4HANA using the Expert View
entry.content:
Abstract

If you are on BW 7.x, planning to modernize your SAP BW system with SAP Datasphere BW bridge or SAP BW/4HANA (on-prem or PCE), and want to save the investments made along the history, you should consider a path which can help you to migrate your data in an automated way, without the need of reinventing the wheel or having additional manual efforts such as data reloads or reinitializations .

This can be achieved with the Remote Conversion, please see my previous blogs on the topic and the Conversion Guide:

1. SAP Datasphere, SAP BW bridge: Demystifying the Remote Conversion

2. SAP Datasphere, BW bridge: How to transfer data from SAP BW or BW/4HANA to a 2-tier tenant landscape

3. SAP Datasphere, SAP BW bridge - Remote Conversion Guide

This blog intends to provide you additional details on how to optimize the data migration by using the 'Expert View' of the Remote Conversion. This capability is available for both SAP Datasphere BW bridge and SAP BW/4HANA and, proven by project experience, it can improve the performance and make your migration runtime up to 20x faster in comparison with the 'Standard View'.

                                                       Figure 1: Data migration options

Motivation

When using the Remote Conversion, one (1) program is generated for every task type of a table in scope. See the Conversion Guide section 3.4 Generation Phase for further details.

Those programs are executed by the tool considering the following sequence:

  1. Read: data selection in the sender system. These programs run in the sender system.
  2. Move: data migration from the sender system to the receiver system. These programs run in the sender system and trigger DIA jobs in the receiver system.
  3. Conversion: data insertion into the corresponding tables of the receiver system. These programs run in the receiver system.

There are other types of programs such as DELTA_MERGE and MOVE_TO_ADSO which run in the receiver system, but not relevant for the purpose of this explanation.

                                                                                            Figure 2: Data transfer logic and sequence

This is the standard behaviour of the tool. This way, each table will have the corresponding phases processed sequentially. 

When you get to the Migration Phase in the Conversion Cockpit, there are basically 2 ways of running the data migration. 

1. “Start Migration” option

It uses the "Standard View" and "Extended View". With this option, the tool automatically controls the sequence/scheduling of the data migration tasks for each table (read –> move –> conversion).

Although it follows a logical sequence, this option may create some idle time in both sender and receiver system, reason why you see the systems not running in full capacity at certain times. It may also create delays for the completeness of the tasks in the sender system - usually the critical path as the sender system is live/operational - making its release to take longer.

   

 

 

 

 

 

 

                     

 

                                                                 Figure 3: Start Migration        

2. “Start Transformation of Identified Tables (Optional)" option

It uses the "Expert View". With this option, it is possible to define/control the sequence and the number of jobs for table types, critical tables, etc. , by for example focusing on the read/move tasks in the sender system. This way, it's possible to finish the sender system tasks faster, release the system and then focus on the receiver tasks afterwards. As the receiver system is usually not operational yet, this approach is commonly agreed with customers. 

This option is not automated like the “Start Migration” one, it requires manual work/intervention and some experience with the data migration logic. This manual intervention is needed to optimize the sequences and keep the systems as busy as possible. By avoiding the idle times, it's possible to considerably improve the overall migration runtimes.

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

                                     Figure 4: Start Transformation of Identified Tables (Optional)

The Conversion Guide section 3.6 Migration Phase describes the option 1.

I will show you in this blog how to use the option 2.

Execution

1. Add the parameter 'PCL_EXPERT' = "X" to the user (s) who will execute the migration package. This will enable the 'Expert View" option in Process Monitor of the Conversion Cockpit.

 

 

 

 

                                                                 Figure 5: Parameters in SU01

2. Check the table CNVLTRL_TEC in the sender system. The field TABGROUP contains the sequence of the table types to be executed.

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

                                                        Figure 6: Table CNVLTRL_TEC - TABGROUP 09

In general there are 6 TABGROUP values:

  • TABGROUP 09: T* and some RS* tables 
  • TABGROUP 10: some SID tables such as /BI0/SCALWEEK, /BI0/SCALYEAR, /BI0/SCURRENCY, etc.
  • TABGROUP 11: /BI0/SCALQUARTER and /BI0/SFISCYEAR
  • TABGROUP 12: /BI0/SCALMONTH and /BI0/SFISCPER
  • TABGROUP 13: /BI0/SDATE
  • TABGROUP 30: all others

In the example I will be demonstrating, there are only tables under TABGROUP 09 and TABGROUP 30, and the content of each TABGROUP may slightly differ depending on the scope that was collected.

3. Run “Start Transformation of Identified Tables (Optional)" as indicated in the Figure 4.

4. Select "Start tasks in sender system", "Read Tasks" and "Move Cluster Tasks", and start the execution with the tables under TABGROUP 09.

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

                  Figure 7: Start Transformation of Identified Tables (Optional) - TABGROUP 09

The flag "Per Table in Sender System" will ensure each selected table will have at least 1 job assigned. The number of jobs to be used depends on how many jobs (BGD work processes) are available in the system. Check the transaction SM50 to verify this information. It's possible to modify the number or DIA and BDG to optimize the execution (transaction RZ03).

5. Run "Monitor Transformation Status for Active Package (Expert)" to display/monitor the tables. You may consider to open this screen in a new session and keep it open for continuous/faster monitoring. 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

                                                            Figure 8: Conversion Monitor - TABGROUP 09

If you filter the monitor including the "Jobs To Do', you can also display the tables that did not start yet.

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

                                       Figure 9: Conversion Monitor for tables with status "To Do"

6. Repeat step (4), now for the tables under TABGROUP 30 (or TABGROUP 10 and every subsequent group in case your scope contains tables under those groups).

You should get the below pop up in case you did close the previous session and need to run it again. Select 'Yes" and proceed.

 

 

 

 

 

                               Figure 10: Confirm the start of a new execution for tables

 

 

 

 

                                                Figure 11: Table CNVLTRL_TEC - TABGROUP 30

It's possible to select the Application Server that will process the set of tables (relevant in case there is more than one Application Server available).

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

                          Figure 12: Start Transformation of Identified Tables (Optional) - TABGROUP 30

 

 

 

                                                   Figure 13: Conversion Monitor - TABGROUP 30

Let's have a look on the status of some tables, sorted by Task Type:

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

                                           Figure 14: Conversion Monitor - status per Task Type

You can also use the "Quick Select" button to select and release tables by type. By having this distribution, you can increase the level of parallelization and ensure as many tables as possible to run. I am now selecting all SID tables, only the ones not yet started will be triggered.

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

                              Figure 15: Start Transformation of Identified Tables (Optional) - Quick Select

Here we can see that all SID tables were finished:

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

                                                   Figure 16: Conversion Monitor - SID tables

I will release 8 new jobs, without specifying any table or type. This way, the tool will randomly pick up tables which did not start yet.

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

                                                   Figure 17: Conversion Monitor - new tables being picked

Updating the monitor, all tables have finished the Read and Move tasks:

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

                                      Figure 18: Conversion Monitor - Read and Move tasks are finished

In "Monitor: Transformation Status (Optional)", we can confirm the Read and Move tasks were finished for all tables in scope. 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

                                              Figure 19: Monitor: Transformation Status (Optional)

With the Read and Move phases finished, this means there are no further tasks to run in the sender system. The sender system can be handed over to the customer and the data loads/process chains there can be resumed in the sender system. 

Before handing over the sender system, you should:

  • Make sure the table RSMIGROBJ in the sender system is empty. This is the lock table for the objects in scope.
  • Run "Confirm Data Selection for Participating BW Objects is Finished in Original System" in the Task List and sync with the Conversion Cockpit.

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

                                 

                                    Figure 20: Confirm Data Selection for Participating BW Objects is Finished in Original System

7. Repeat steps (3) to (6), the difference is that now you should select "Start tasks in receiver system".

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

                                                      Figure 21: Conversion Monitor - insertion for TABGROUP 09

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

                                               

                                                         Figure 22: Conversion Monitor - insertion for TABGROUP 30

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

                                                            Figure 23: Overall status per phase and last table in progress

With "Verify Task Completion", you can check if all tasks were finished, including the conversion ones. In case there is any task missing, this activity will raise an error and indicate which table/tasks still needs to be processed.

                                            Figure 24: Verify Task Completion

In "Monitor: Transformation Status (Optional)", all tasks for all tables in scope are now finished.

                                               Figure 25: Monitor: Transformation Status (Optional) - all tasks finished

With that, the new data loads/process chains can now be started in the receiver system. Even if the the data loads were earlier resumed in the sender system, the delta queues were cloned and synchronized - ensuring the consistency of the data loads for both sender and receiver systems. This is one of the benefits of the Remote Conversion, offering the possibility of having both systems running in parallel, for example, during the validation/stabilization period.

Conclusion

The scope of this run contained 130 tables (/BI* and RS*) with 100 million records. Up to 8 BTC work processes were used in parallel.

Here a comparison between the runtimes of the 'Standard View" and 'Expert View' for the same scope:

Standard View: 48 minutes

  • Read + Move tasks: 15 minutes
  • Conversion tasks: 33 minutes

Expert View: 16 minutes

  • Read + Move tasks: 5 minutes
  • Conversion tasks: 11 minutes

It was possible to run the data migration 3x faster for this particular scope. The larger the scope, the more this factor can be improved.

For the purpose of this blog, the conversion tasks were triggered only after the read/move ones were finished. In practice, it is also possible to parallelize all task types, allowing even faster runtimes to be achieved.

Felipe Capano

entry.title: Re: How to show a custom message in story while the table values load from live connection?
entry.content: When the story loads for the first time, there is some delay in refreshing the data for the widgets which pulls data from live data source. My requirement is to show a custom message to the users until all the data in these widgets is refreshed within the story.

entry.title: Action Project does not returning the Output in Automation
entry.content:
Action is configured with the proper Output schema and it is returning the output in the Action Project. But when it is published and used it as a dependency in automation it is not returning anything.

Tried to delete the entire Output schema from the action and generate it using the test results. But that doesn't helped to solve the issue.

entry.title: Re: Taking Groups to the Next Level with Application-Specific Groups
entry.content:
Hi,

The application ID does not influence the uniqueness of the groups. When groups with the same DisplayName are read from two source systems, the first provisioning job creates the group in the target system, and the second job updates it. This is how the IPS conflict resolution mechanism works. To distinguish between the groups in the target system, you can use the xsuaa.group.prefix property, as described in the List of Properties.

Best regards,

Ivelina

entry.title: Re: Adapter Module to stop processing of duplicate file (FTP Location) ==> Code Example Fixed
entry.content:
Hi  isudoajl_ine,

  Is this post correction of original post by Sandeep Jaiswal or you are facing any issues with the adapter module. 

 

Regards

Anupam

entry.title: How to book surcharges to stock inventory without/before having a GR
entry.content:
Hi all,

I am facing the challenge that we send empty containers to our suppliers which the use to fill with the product and send it back to us. Therefore we have at first the shipping to our supplier with a freight company A and maybe the shipping from our supplier to us with a freight company B. I would like to book all surcharges to the material / inventory stock but was wondering how that is possible because our GR is made when the goods actually arrive at our plant.

 

Thanks a lot for you support,

Henrik

entry.title: Re: Replace a Model in the Optimized (Unified) Experience
entry.content: @ChintS We have not migrated our reports to Datasphere yet. Meanwhile, I have created a feature request to Datasphere product development team and it's in progress.

entry.title: Re: How to Install SSL Certificate for SAP B1 Web Browser...
entry.content: Do i need domaine name or not ?

entry.title: Re: More than one validity area in import file
entry.content: Yes I load it via the OCC.

entry.title: Re: Cloud identity service user created failed login to a...
entry.content:
Hi Davide,

you write that you try to login via default identity provider. Why though? If I understood you right, you would want to use SAP IAS as custom IdP for authentication, after you set up the trust configuration for this. The SAP default identity provider will always authenticate via S-User.

Best regards
Dominik

entry.title: SAP ECC 6 EHP7 change of Customer name update in past orders and invoices
entry.content:
Description: I have a scenario that user create a new sales order by copy from a reference document. Follow by
changing customer name in the sales orders, this action update all customer name with same customer code in past sales orders and invoices that is having the same customer code.
This customer code is generic customer code use for case sales scenarios.

entry.title: Re: How do I edit the timestamp of the SFTP Adapter in SA...
entry.content:
Hi Anupam,

Thanks for replying. I will give it a shot and let you know how it went.

Kind regards,

Miguel

entry.title: Re: Adapter Module to stop processing of duplicate file (FTP Location) ==> Code Example Fixed
entry.content:
Hello @anupam_ghosh2

If you go to the link of the original post, the code is not formatted. What I did was reorder everything and format the code to make it more understandable and perceptible.

Regarding your question, I haven't implemented it, but it gave me some insight into making my custom implementation that I'm working on.

The original post is very old and due to changes (update) in the structure of the Sap community, it has suffered the consequences.

entry.title: Re: BTP Trial version, Open Excel Instance of irpa_Excel...
entry.content:
Hi,

The Excel SDK contains two types of activities :

- Activities interacting with Excel application (using Excel API) : there is a complete set of activities, including advanced usage like formatting or pivot table management --> they are only available for Windows

- Activities interacting with Excel files (without Excel application being installed) : there is a limited set of activities, but it covers common usages (like reading/writing data) --> they are available for Windows and MacOS

Best regards

Christophe

entry.title: Re: SAP Build Process Automation – SMTP Mail Destination using Microsoft 365 email provider
entry.content:
Hi @Anusha_N_Gowda,

While testing a Mail after I Created the SMTP Microsoft.365 Mail Destination, so I too facing the same issue what you have mentioned before (An unexpected error has occurred due to missing SMTP configuration).




@Anusha_N_Gowda if you are done with this issue please share us the information in this blog.

Hi @KarthikeyanMurthy,
if you have any solved blogs regarding the same issue please refer that in this blog only so it would be helpful for many.

Regards,
Ajith E

entry.title: Re: MDG Cloud Ready Mode: Custom Workflow template in SAP build process automation with S/4HANA
entry.content:
Hi Anirban,

Thanks for sharing your perspective.  I completely agree, creating workflows with SAP Build Process Automation is indeed much easier and more intuitive compared to the classic SAP Business Workflow and BRF+ combination.

Regarding Cloud Ready Mode being "aggressively worked upon by SAP", my concern is that the MDG Roadmap suggests a slower pace of progress.  Innovations are currently being released only in the first and last quarters of the year, rather than quarterly.  Additionally, support is currently limited to the Business Partner object, with Product (Material Master) still categorised under "Product Vision", indicating that broad coverage of master data objects in Cloud Ready Mode may not be available anytime soon.

I'd be interested to know your thoughts on this.


MDG Roadmap

 
Regards,
Mustafa.

entry.title: Split an overall value data according to start date and end date
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

Need a solution for this scenario.

Eg, I have a contract with a building from 15.05.2023 - 14.05.2024. In this period I have got a contract amount of 1,25,000 as revenue. Now in my table I want to split this value for each month according to contract start date and end date to show my revenue of each month. 

Is it possible to achieve this in SAC .

Not really required with the same table format but the concept support is required.

Regards,

Sunandha

entry.title: Blank Screen when extending the project using SAP Web IDE
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

I tried to extend a standard fiori app (Display Vendor Line Items) thru sap web ide, but unfortunately im getting an error that says : ModuleError: failed to load 'sap/fin/arp/lib/lineitems/library.js' from /sap/bc/ui5_ui5/sap/FIN_VEN_LITS/sap/fin/arp/lib/lineitems/library.js: 404 - Not Found

Here is the file, after creating a new extension project;



after running the extensible pane, it showing blank screen. anyone help me please. thank you.

entry.title: Re: list of items field is not displaying (SAP b1)
entry.content:
Hi,

The Form Settings setup gets applied for the window on the next opening of the window again.

If you have made the Display of the 'Item Cost' applicable and then have not closed the List of Items, then it is not appear instantly. You have to close the List of Items window and re-open it to check if the field activated appears.

If this is not the case, then you can check on COPY of the database, by making the fields in the Form Settings of the List of Items window to 'Restore to Default', then add the fields as required to display, close the List of Items window and re-open to check.

Kr

Jitin

entry.title: Consuming API Hub Services in ABAP Cloud (RAP)
entry.content:
This document explains how to call the HTTP services in ABAP Cloud, from the SAP API Hub

• In this example we obtaining Email address by providing address number and Business Partner Number. Over View •

Step-1:consume an external API from the SAP API Hub


 https://api.sap.com/api/API_BUSINESS_PARTNER/resource/Email_ Address

• Step-2: Calling the API in ABAP Cloud Platform.

 CLASS zemail DEFINITION
PUBLIC
FINAL
CREATE PUBLIC .
PUBLIC SECTION.
METHODS get_email_id IMPORTING addrnr TYPE string bpnumber TYPE string EXPORTING emailid
TYPE string.
PROTECTED SECTION.
PRIVATE SECTION.
ENDCLASS.

CLASS zemail IMPLEMENTATION.
METHOD get_email_id.
DATA: lv_url TYPE string,
lo_http_client TYPE REF TO if_web_http_client.
TYPES:
BEGIN OF ty_metadata,
id TYPE string,
uri TYPE string,
type TYPE string,
END OF ty_metadata,

BEGIN OF ty_address_email,
__metadata TYPE ty_metadata,
addressid TYPE string,
person TYPE string,
ordinalnumber TYPE string,
isdefaultemailaddress TYPE string,
emailaddress TYPE string,
searchemailaddress TYPE string,
addresscommunicationremarktext TYPE string,
END OF ty_address_email,
BEGIN OF ty_root,
__count TYPE string,
results TYPE STANDARD TABLE OF ty_address_email WITH EMPTY KEY,
END OF ty_root,
BEGIN OF ty_root1,
d TYPE ty_root,
END OF ty_root1.
DATA : lv_root TYPE ty_root1.

lv_url = |https://sandbox.api.sap.com/s4hanacloud/sap/
/opu/odata/sap/API_BUSINESS_PARTNER/A_BusinessPartnerAddress(BusinessPartner='{ bpnumber
}',AddressID='{ addrnr }')/to_EmailAddress?$top=50&$inlinecount=allpages|.
TRY.
lo_http_client = cl_web_http_client_manager=>create_by_http_destination(
i_destination = cl_http_destination_provider=>create_by_url( i_url = lv_url ) ).
CATCH cx_web_http_client_error cx_http_dest_provider_error.
"handle exception
ENDTRY.

DATA(lo_request) = lo_http_client->get_http_request( ).
lo_request->set_header_fields( VALUE #(
( name = 'Accept' value = 'application/json')
( name = 'DataServiceVersion' value = '2.0' )
)
).

lo_request->set_authorization_basic(

EXPORTING i_username = <User name>

i_password = <password>

RECEIVING r_value = DATA(l_value) ).

TRY. DATA(lv_response) = lo_http_client->execute(

i_method = if_web_http_client=>get )->get_text( ).

CATCH cx_web_http_client_error cx_web_message_error.

"handle exception ENDTRY.

lo_request->get_last_error(
RECEIVING
rc = DATA(lv_error)
).

/ui2/cl_json=>deserialize(
EXPORTING
json = lv_response
CHANGING
data = lv_root ).

LOOP AT lv_root-d-results INTO DATA(wa).
IF emailid = ' '.
emailid = wa-emailaddress.
ELSE.
CONCATENATE emailid wa-emailaddress INTO emailid SEPARATED BY ','.
ENDIF.
ENDLOOP.
ENDMETHOD.
ENDCLASS.

entry.title: Re: ABAP CDS View Service Binding unpublished after transport
entry.content: Am also facing the same issue Can anyone help for Public cloud as Service Binding unpublished in Test system.

entry.title: Unable to extend F3117- My Personal Data app using UI Adaptation in S/4 Hana 2023
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

Greetings!

Looking for support in standard Fiori app extension. We have to perform below changes in F3117(My Personal Data) app:

  1. Form of address to be renamed as Title
  2. Remove Gender from Other Personal Data section and add under Birth Data section
  3. And few more similar changes.

On premises system details: SAP FIORI FOR S4HANA 2023 01 (02/2024) FPS sap.com SAP FIORI FOR SAP S/4HANA 2023

We have created adaptation project in VS Code for same application. 

When we open app in Adaptation editor, All UI controls within Simple Form are disabled and we are not getting option to adapt UI and rename, remove, add as shown in Work with SAPUI5 Adaptation Projects to generate and make simple changes to an application variant of an SAP Fiori application in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition (1 of 3) | SAP Tutorials

SAPUI5 Adaptation

We are expecting all UI controls within Simple Form should be in adapt mode and enable for us to do required changes like below (screenshot from above tutorial)

We verified in Fiori apps library, no were mentioned what can be adapted for this specific app.

Could someone please assist on the same?

Is this app not meant for UI adaptation?

Thanks in Advance!

Sweety.

entry.title: Re: RAP Business Events with Advanced Event Mesh [2]: Creating custom business events
entry.content:
Hi @smohan29,

where do you raise the event? Or in other words where do you call the on_SalesOrder_Created method? Are you using a BAdI or a local event handler?
Alternatively I would recommend using derived events since the event seems to be coupled to the standard sales order created event. You can add your Z-fields in the custom CDS view of the derived event.

Regards,

Timo

entry.title: Re: Percentage in cross model
entry.content:
Hi @Ganjos

To make clear business requirements, please provide the example table(Grid) for the HR model, P&L model(General Expense) with data, and expected result for Source data. 

Moonjun

entry.title: Re: list of items field is not displaying (SAP b1)
entry.content: Noted on the second solution sir. I will do it and give you some feedback. Thank you appreciate

entry.title: Re: Can we use open source libraries with RAP or CAP ?
entry.content:
For abap you can have a look at open source projects here: https://dotabap.org

you have to use abapgit to import them.

 

for ui5, @MioYasutake already answered. But are you looking for image editor or really files? For images, you can use the following: https://ui5.sap.com/#/entity/sap.suite.ui.commons.imageeditor

entry.title: Re: Please advise how to write on WBS Budget Availability...
entry.content:
Dear @GiorgioDep,

to make use of the Budget Availability Control, you can either use SAP Analytics Cloud or the Import Financial Plan Data app.
Please have a look at our documentation Integration with Budget Availability Control where we explain how to maintain categories for the Budget Availability Control and Budget Checks and how you can upload your data into your S/4HANA system.

Please let me know if this answers your question.

Best regards
Susanne

entry.title: Re: SAP Integration Suite - IMAP and SMTP connection to Gmail with OAuth2 Authorization Code
entry.content: Good stuff. Thanks for sharing 😎

entry.title: Re: I'd like to configure the SAP Destination service to use a certificate issued by private CA.
entry.content: Can you test the destination in an application using an approuter? What do you get as an error? I had some issues some time back and it was related to the type of the cherry. You need to check for the supported certificate types.

entry.title: Re: aseuserstore and dbisql
entry.content:
Hi Robert,
'dbisql' doesn't support using aseuserstore, ASE utilities like isql, bcp, defncopy, and optdiag which supports -k parameter can use the aseuserstore, see the Help Portal: https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_ASE/2705a3b1e3df4514ab089cfedf87750d/25ebc1716bfa4b8789086f4d4c411499.html?locale=en-US

You may consider to use isql with -k instead.

The `dbisql` would expect the username and password to be provided upfront, and when leaving 'user' empty, you can see the 'Connect' button would grey out.

entry.title: Re: Message No. CPCL_VERS106 - No inspection type for ori...
entry.content: bug it seems. before creating sf routing the QM type to be activated in material. once sf routing created without insp type we cannot add MIC for changes. Later created new material with insp type to get it worked.
